message:
audit: batch 473-474 — fabric.rs oracle test fix logged

Record the fabric oracle tracing assertion fix (batch 473, agent SapphireHill)
in the audit index. The underlying bug was that test assertions on tracing events
were unconditional but the tracing-integration feature was not enabled, causing
a guaranteed panic. Verdict: FIXED, 1 bug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
